title: Knowledge Store, Vector Memory, And Agentic Layer Complete
exit_criteria_met: Structured knowledge events are persisted as append-only JSONL records.
Vector-memory retrieval index is built from structured retrieval documents.
Retrieval outputs are provenance-cited and advisory-only.
Bounded agent roles enforce governance authority boundaries.
Agentic features do not weaken governance or runtime truth.
code_changes: src/agentic_forex/goblin/models.py: added KnowledgeEventRecord, RetrievalIndex/Entry, RetrievalCitation/Response, AgentAction, and BoundedAgentRole
src/agentic_forex/goblin/controls.py: added append_knowledge_event, write_retrieval_document, build_retrieval_index, retrieve_with_provenance, write_bounded_agent_role, assert_agent_action_allowed
src/agentic_forex/utils/paths.py: added P12 knowledge/vector/roles/query path properties
src/agentic_forex/goblin/__init__.py: exported P12 models and controls
Goblin/contracts/knowledge-lineage.md: expanded with event-store, retrieval-document, and bounded-role rules
Goblin/contracts/retrieval-policy.md: expanded with indexing scope and governance boundaries
tests/test_goblin_p12.py: added focused P12 test coverage
assumptions: Token-overlap retrieval scoring is acceptable for deterministic advisory retrieval in this phase.
Bounded agent roles are enforced through explicit action checks before role-driven operations.
